message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

abstract class Pizza << (A,#BFE8E8) >> {
  +void prepare()
  +void bake()
  +void cut()
  +void box()
}

interface AbsFactory << (I,#B9A7E6) >> {
  +Pizza createPizza();
}

class OrderPizza << (C,#BFE3BF) >>

class LDPepperPizza << (C,#BFE3BF) >>
class LDCheesePizza << (C,#BFE3BF) >>
class BJPepperPizza << (C,#BFE3BF) >>
class BJCheesePizza << (C,#BFE3BF) >>

class LDFactory << (C,#BFE3BF) >>
class BJFactory << (C,#BFE3BF) >>

OrderPizza o-- AbsFactory

LDPepperPizza --|> Pizza
LDCheesePizza --|> Pizza
BJPepperPizza --|> Pizza
BJCheesePizza --|> Pizza

LDFactory ..|> AbsFactory
BJFactory ..|> AbsFactory

LDFactory ..> LDPepperPizza
LDFactory ..> LDCheesePizza

BJFactory ..> BJPepperPizza
BJFactory ..> BJCheesePizza
@enduml
